overview: MY‑AI is a minimalist, ternary‑based search engine that prioritises privacy and relevance. It uses a Ternary Search Tree for fast prefix queries and TF‑IDF ranking. This overview is generated by a lightweight AI model that summarises the top results for your query.

bestLink.title: Introducing MY‑AI: The Search Engine
bestLink.snippet: A clean, ternary‑powered search engine that respects your privacy. No tracking, no clutter, just pure information retrieval.
